WPFAppxMicrosoft_WindowsFeedbackHub.Description: Allows users to submit bug reports, feature suggestions, and diagnostic data directly to Microsoft.

WPFAppxMicrosoft_GetHelp.Description: Provides access to automated troubleshooting guides, support documentation, and direct Microsoft customer assistance.

WPFAppxMicrosoft_OutlookForWindows.Description: Provides modern email management, calendar scheduling, and contact organization features.

WPFAppxMSTeams.Description: Facilitates instant messaging, video conferencing, file sharing, and workspace collaboration.

WPFAppxClipchamp_Clipchamp.Description: Provides a user-friendly video editor with built-in templates, effects, and timeline editing tools.

WPFAppxMicrosoft_MicrosoftOfficeHub.Description: Serves as a centralized launcher and dashboard for accessing cloud-based Microsoft 365 apps and recent documents.

WPFAppxMicrosoft_ZuneMusic.Description: Plays local audio and video files with modern playlist management and casting capabilities.

WPFAppxMicrosoft_BingSearch.Description: Integrates Microsoft Bing search capabilities and web services directly into the operating system.

WPFAppxMicrosoftCorporationII_QuickAssis.Description: Enables secure remote technical support and screen sharing over an internet connection.

WPFAppxMicrosoft_WindowsDevHome.Description: Provides a specialized dashboard for software developer environment setups, repository syncing, and hardware widgets.

WPFAppxMicrosoft_WindowsCrossDevice.Description: Manages system-level background connectivity with paired mobile devices. Removing this may disable cross-device features such as phone screen mirroring, file transfer, and mobile hotspot handoff integrated into Windows Settings.

WPFAppxMicrosoft_Todos.Description: Creates, tracks, and synchronizes personal tasks, smart lists, and daily reminders.

WPFAppxMicrosoft_PowerAutomateDesktop.Description: Automates repetitive workflows and desktop tasks using low-code visual scripting.

WPFAppxMicrosoft_YourPhone.Description: Synchronizes text messages, phone notifications, photos, and calls from a mobile device to the desktop.

WPFAppxMicrosoft_MicrosoftStickyNotes.Description: Creates quick, floating text notes on the desktop that automatically sync across devices.

WPFAppxMicrosoft_WindowsSoundRecorder.Description: Records and trims live audio inputs with simple microphone adjustment controls.

WPFAppxMicrosoft_WindowsAlarms.Description: Features world clocks, alarms, countdown timers, stopwatches, and dedicated focus session tracking.

WPFAppxMicrosoft_Paint.Description: Provides built-in digital sketching, basic image editing, and pixel-level graphic manipulation tools.

WPFAppxMicrosoft_WindowsNotepad.Description: Provides a lightweight text editor with multi-tab support for plain text files and code snippets.

WPFAppxMicrosoft_ScreenSketch.Description: Captures screenshots or screen recordings with built-in markup, image cropping, and optical character recognition (OCR).

WPFAppxMicrosoft_Copilot.Description: Launches the Microsoft AI companion for contextual answers, creative writing assistance, and intelligent web search.

WPFAppxMicrosoft_WindowsCalculator.Description: Performs standard arithmetic, scientific operations, programming calculations, and unit conversions.

WPFAppxMicrosoft_WindowsCamera.Description: Captures photographs and records video files via connected webcams or imaging hardware.

WPFAppxMicrosoft_WindowsPhotos.Description: Organizes, views, and crops local images with basic color adjustment and album creation tools.

WPFAppxMicrosoft_BingNews.Description: Aggregates breaking news headlines, personalized article feeds, and world current events.

WPFAppxMicrosoft_BingWeather.Description: Displays local real-time weather tracking, radar maps, and historical meteorological forecasts.

WPFAppxMicrosoft_GamingApp.Description: Serves as the primary gaming library manager, social community interface, and PC Game Pass dashboard.

WPFAppxMicrosoft_XboxGamingOverlay.Description: Provides customizable in-game status widgets, audio balancing sliders, system monitoring tools, and gameplay recording.

WPFAppxMicrosoft_XboxIdentityProvider.Description: Manages Xbox network user authentication and background account validation for connected titles. Warning: removing this may break Microsoft account sign-in for non-Xbox games and apps that rely on this authentication pipeline.

WPFAppxMicrosoft_XboxSpeechToTextOverlay.Description: Provides system-level live accessibility captions and voice-to-text translation for gaming chat networks.

WPFAppxMicrosoft_Xbox_TCUI.Description: Provides core account connection UI modules for single sign-on flows within game titles. Warning: removing this may break Microsoft account authentication in games and apps that do not otherwise require the Xbox app.

WPFAppxMicrosoft_StartExperiencesApp.Description: Powers the Windows Widgets board, delivering a personalized feed of news, weather, sports, and finance content.

WPFAppxMicrosoft_MicrosoftSolitaireColle.Description: Bundles built-in card game modes including Klondike, Spider, FreeCell, Pyramid, and TriPeaks alongside daily challenges.
